title: The Earth Prays for Krishna to Come
summary_seed: Mother Earth feels burdened by cruel kings and seeks help from Lord Brahma. The demigods pray to Lord Vishnu, and the Lord promises to appear.

title: The Wedding and the Heavenly Voice
summary_seed: Devaki and Vasudeva are married. Kamsa hears the prophecy that Devaki's eighth son will defeat him.

title: Vasudeva's Promise and Kamsa's Fear
summary_seed: Vasudeva protects Devaki through wise words and promises to bring each child to Kamsa. Kamsa is controlled by fear.

title: Prayers in the Prison
summary_seed: The Lord prepares to appear. The demigods offer prayers, and Devaki shines with spiritual beauty.

title: Krishna Appears at Midnight
summary_seed: Lord Krishna appears before Devaki and Vasudeva in the prison, revealing His divine form.

title: Vasudeva Crosses the Yamuna
summary_seed: Vasudeva carries baby Krishna across the Yamuna while the Lord protects him.

title: Nanda Maharaja Celebrates Krishna's Birth
summary_seed: The residents of Gokula celebrate Krishna's birth with joy, gifts, music, and blessings.

title: Putana Comes to Gokula
summary_seed: Putana comes to harm baby Krishna, but Krishna protects everyone and gives her liberation.

title: Krishna Breaks the Cart
summary_seed: Baby Krishna kicks the cart demon and protects the village.

title: The Whirlwind Demon
summary_seed: Trinavarta carries Krishna into the sky, but Krishna becomes heavy and defeats him.
